steps.title: Use the pigment evidence
steps.content: The text explains that red ocher gets its color from iron oxide, while plant-based pigments have high carbon. The tested bead pigment had no iron and high carbon, so the evidence points to a plant-based pigment rather than ocher.

steps.title: Reject unsupported extensions
steps.content: Choice A claims the beads are the oldest examples, which the text never establishes. Choice C invents a preference based on brightness. Choice D invents a reason involving the difficulty of finding ocher. The answer is B.
